hooks.command: echo '=== Session start ===' && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null && echo '--- Last 5 commits ---' && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null && echo '--- Context: use /compact at 50% ---'

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.py$'; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command','')[:120])" 2>/dev/null); echo "[audit] bash: $CMD" >> .claude/session-audit.log 2>/dev/null; true
osascript -e 'display notification "Task complete" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Task complete' 2>/dev/null || echo '[claude] Task complete'; true

_dynamic_hooks_note: inception agent adds stack-specific hooks here during bootstrap
